creator: vrachil@gmail.com
text:
I wanted to add that on a machine that on 9-CURRENT amd64 (r224864) i
was running htop-0.9 without a problem.
Today I updated to 0.9_1 and I got the memory overflow(?).
The process list was fine though. Downgrading to 0.9 fixes the memory
issue (I did not have any other problem with it).
